summary: Iteration 148: P1 Sandbox Simulation API fully verified. All 24 tests passed (9 unit tests + 15 API tests). Both HotelRunner and Exely providers achieve 100% pass rate across all 5 resilience scenarios.
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 scenarios correctly implemented: duplicate_delivery, delayed_ack, retry_storm, stale_provider_state, modify_cancel_race
Deduplication logic correctly uses payload_fingerprint to detect duplicates
Retry storm handling ensures idempotent imports with zero oversell
Modify/cancel race produces deterministic sequence: new → modified → cancelled
Stale provider state detection and reconciliation recovery working correctly
Timeline events properly recorded: scenario_start, scenario_complete, reservation_processed, ack_failed, ack_retry_success, reconciliation_triggered
Per-provider result tables include pass_rate calculation
Sandbox uses unique SANDBOX-{run_id} property IDs to avoid unique index conflicts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 148 verified P1 Sandbox Simulation. Key endpoints: POST /api/channel-manager/v2/sandbox/simulate (runs all 5 scenarios for hotelrunner/exely), GET /api/channel-manager/v2/sandbox/results (list recent results), GET /api/channel-manager/v2/sandbox/results/{run_id} (specific result), GET /api/channel-manager/v2/sandbox/timeline/{run_id} (event timeline), DELETE /api/channel-manager/v2/sandbox/cleanup/{run_id} (cleanup). All scenarios pass with 100% pass rate for both providers.

POST /api/channel-manager/v2/sandbox/sim.notes: Returns run_id, summary (total_scenarios=10, passed=10, failed=0, pass_rate=100%, all_passed=true), provider_results with per-provider tables

GET /api/channel-manager/v2/sandbox/resu.notes: Returns list of recent simulation results with run_id, summary, provider_results
Returns specific simulation result by run_id

GET /api/channel-manager/v2/sandbox/time.notes: Returns 46 timeline events including scenario_start, scenario_complete, reservation_processed, ack_failed, ack_retry_success, reconciliation_triggered, stale_state_injected

mocked_api_note: The sandbox simulation itself is a MOCK system - it uses synthetic data generated by provider_harness.py and processes through real business logic (dedup, import pipeline, reconciliation). No external provider APIs are called.
